publishedAbstract: Rook Ceph OSD Prepare Jobs create "PrometheusDuplicateTimestamps alerts". Follow KCS [How to determine the cause for PrometheusDuplicateTimestamps alerts.](https://access.redhat.com/articles/7113719) to ensure the source of the `Duplicates`.
publishedTitle: ODF:  Rook Ceph OSD Prepare Jobs create "PrometheusDuplicateTimestamps alerts".
